sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ بَغْدَادُ مَرْكَزًا كَبِيرًا لِلْعِلْمِ وَالْأَدَبِ فِي الْعُصُورِ الْوُسْطَى.
sentences.translation: Bagdad je bio veliki centar nauke i književnosti u srednjem vijeku.
sentences.translationEn: Baghdad was a major center for science and literature in the Middle Ages.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ مَكْتَبَةُ "بَيْتِ الْحِكْمَةِ" تَضُمُّ آلَافَ الْكُتُبِ وَالْمَخْطُوطَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Biblioteka 'Kuća mudrosti' sadržavala je hiljade knjiga i rukopisa.
sentences.translationEn: The 'House of Wisdom' library contained thousands of books and manuscripts.

sentences.arabic: سَافَرَ الْعُلَمَاءُ مِنْ كُلِّ مَكَانٍ لِلْقِرَاءَةِ وَالتَّرْجَمَةِ هُنَاكَ.
sentences.translation: Učenjaci su putovali odasvud kako bi tamo čitali i prevodili.
sentences.translationEn: Scholars traveled from everywhere to read and translate there.

sentences.arabic: كَتَبَ الْأُدَبَاءُ عَنْ الْفَلْسَفَةِ وَالطِّبِّ وَالشِّعْرِ.
sentences.translation: Književnici su pisali o filozofiji, medicini i poeziji.
sentences.translationEn: Writers wrote about philosophy, medicine, and poetry.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا التَّارِيخُ يَجْعَلُنَا نَفْتَخِرُ بِالثَّقَافَةِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ الْأَصِيلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ova historija nas čini ponosnim na autentičnu arapsku kulturu.
sentences.translationEn: This history makes us proud of authentic Arabic culture.
